⚠ Critical Path
  • All Phase 1 structural, roof and waterproofing work MUST complete before Azuero rainy season - May 2026.
  • Semana Santa April 2026 = full labor pause.
  • MINSA approval required before any septic tank relocation work - Phase 4.
